title: Tangy Light Filipino Butternut Squash Soup
description: A creamy, fermented coconut milk-based soup with a bright tang, light yet satisfying with butternut squash and classic Filipino aromatics.

ingredients.name: fermented coconut milk
ingredients.notes: Use coconut yogurt or fermented coconut milk for tanginess

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion, minced garlic, and minced ginger; sauté until onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in ground turmeric and ground coriander, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add diced butternut squash and vegetable stock; bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until squash is tender.
Stir in fermented coconut milk and tamari; simmer for an additional 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Taste and season with salt and pepper as needed.
For a smoother texture, use an immersion blender to puree the soup until creamy.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a swirl of coconut milk or fresh herbs.
